ItacWorkItem.ShortTitle: Canzonette a tre voci dell’Affettuoso. Libro Quinto. Canto P. (Canto S.) (Basso.)
ItacWorkItem.Notes: From the British Library catalogue: `Engraved throughout. In the Canto Primo part 3 is in duplicate. The dedication is signed by Camillo Ghini, the engraver. The composer, whose identity is uncertain, was a member of the Accademia dei Filomeli of Siena. This collection also contains Canzonets by Desiderio Pecci and H. Palermita.`
ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
